title: Why Do Shadows Dance?
poem_text:
Why do shadows dance on my wall?
Do they hear the tick of the clock so small?
Can a sock forget where it wants to go?
Does a spoon dream of being a bow?
Why does my toast jump up and cheer?
Does it know that breakfast’s near?
Can the stars play tag in the sky?
Do they ever get tired and sigh?
Why does my blanket twist and turn?
Does it want to learn how to burn?
If I ask it now, will it say…
What’s keeping *you* up anyway?
cover_context: A child’s bedroom at dusk, shadows stretching like playful creatures on the walls while a glowing clock ticks softly.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, guitar and gentle beatbox, 112 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
